title: A Birthday by Christina Rossetti — Love Poetry Lines
meaning: "A Birthday" by Christina Rossetti is a love and nature poem consisting of 17 lines. The poet explores themes of love and nature through vivid imagery and emotional depth. Beginning with "My heart is like a singing bird Whose nest is in a water'd shoot;...", this piece captures the essence of human experience and invites reflection on the deeper currents of life and feeling. This work is part of Christina Rossetti's celebrated body of poetry that continues to resonate with readers worldwide.
